name: Velidreth
location: Velidreth in Cradle of Shadows, Urgarlag Chief-bane

bonuses.stat: When you deal damage, you have a 20% chance to spawn 3 disease spores in front of you after 1 second that deal 1557 Disease damage to any enemy they hit. This effect can occur once every 8 seconds and scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.
